 {"id":"beads_rust-nz0","title":"ID Resolution & Prefix Matching","description":"# ID Resolution & Prefix Matching

## Purpose
Implement classic partial ID resolution and prefix validation used by show/update/close/dep/etc.

## Partial ID Resolution
Order:
1. Exact ID match (`SearchIssues` by IDs).
2. Normalize: if missing prefix, prepend `issue_prefix-` and retry exact match.
3. Substring match on hash portion across all prefixes.
4. Ambiguity => error with candidate list.

## Prefix Validation
- Explicit IDs must match `issue_prefix` or `allowed_prefixes` unless `--force`.
- Trailing hyphen in prefix input is accepted; stored prefix has **no** trailing hyphen.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Matches bd resolution order and ambiguity handling.
- Hierarchical IDs (`bd-abc.1`) supported.

## Tests
- Exact, prefix, hash-only, substring matching.
- Ambiguous match error lists candidates.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T06:17:23.123240361Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T14:01:13.998727366Z","closed_at":"2026-01-16T14:01:13.998727366Z","close_reason":"Implementation complete in src/util/id.rs. Added IdResolver, ResolverConfig, MatchType, ResolvedId, find_matching_ids, resolve_id with comprehensive tests. Note: codebase has unrelated compilation issues from other agents WIP that block cargo test."}

 {"id":"beads_rust-od2j","title":"Unit tests: Entry point modules (main.rs, lib.rs, logging.rs)","description":"# Unit Tests for Entry Point Modules

## Background
These core modules lack unit tests and are only tested indirectly via E2E.

## Modules to Test

### main.rs
- CLI argument parsing
- Command dispatch logic
- Error code mapping
- Global flag handling (--json, --verbose, --quiet)

### lib.rs
- Public API surface
- Module re-exports
- Feature flag conditionals

### logging.rs
- Logger initialization (init_logging)
- Test logger (init_test_logging)
- Log level parsing
- Tracing subscriber configuration

## Test Cases

### main.rs Tests
1. Parse valid command arguments
2. Parse global flags (--json, --verbose)
3. Error exit codes match expected
4. Version output format
5. Help output contains all commands

### lib.rs Tests
6. Public API accessible
7. Feature-gated modules conditional
8. No panic on initialization

### logging.rs Tests
9. init_logging doesn't panic
10. init_test_logging is idempotent
11. Log level respects RUST_LOG env
12. Test writer captures output

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 3 modules have #[cfg(test)] sections
- [ ] 12+ unit test functions total
- [ ] No mocks - test real behavior
- [ ] Tests pass in isolation","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"JadeBeaver","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T09:28:09.580033086-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T10:18:47.534259133-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-17T10:18:47.534259133-05:00","close_reason":"Added unit tests for main/lib/logging; ran cargo test --lib and cargo test --bin br","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"beads_rust-od2j","depends_on_id":"beads_rust-an3","type":"parent_child","created_at":"2026-01-17T09:28:18.831246303-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
 {"id":"beads_rust-oqa","title":"External dependency resolution (external:<project>:<capability>)","description":"# External Dependency Resolution (external:<project>:<capability>)

## Purpose
Support classic external dependency semantics for ready/blocked and dependency trees.

## Encoding
- External dependency ID: `external:<project>:<capability>`
- Satisfied when external project has a **closed** issue labeled `provides:<capability>`.

## Config
- `external_projects` in config.yaml maps project name → path.

## Behavior
- External deps are **not** stored in blocked cache.
- Evaluated at query time (ready/blocked/tree) to avoid multi-DB work during cache rebuild.
- Open each external project DB **once per project**, batch by capability.

## Output
- In dep tree, synthesize external leaf nodes:
  - status `closed` if satisfied, else `blocked`
  - title prefixed `✓` or `⏳`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Ready/blocked filters respect external deps.
- External deps appear in dep tree (down direction only).

## Tests
- Mock external project with provides labels.
- Unresolved external deps remain blocking.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T07:03:46.203704905Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T03:53:40.739867167Z","closed_at":"2026-01-17T03:53:40.739867167Z","close_reason":"Completed"}
